programs.title: Renovation Face-Off
programs.desc: It's Fix My Flip vs. Help! I Wrecked My House as Jasmine Roth and Page Turner go head-to-head to see who has the best ambitious addition.

programs.title: Two Steps Home
programs.desc: While working with two new parents, Mary pulls out her design tricks to set their home apart from the competition.

programs.title: Down Home Fab
programs.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a client who could help make or break their design business. They transform a living area into an open concept kitchen.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: David helps a mother and her daughter reunite to find a home in honour of their late son and brother in Ojai, California.

programs.title: Ugliest House In America
programs.desc: A house where art has taken over the walls, a former church with a terrifying hole and a once-glamorous home compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programs.title: Bargain Block
programs.desc: The guys take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a dream home. Keith sees this as an opportunity to create a chic, English countryside escape.
